docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00 SERVED APR-02-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARAJAS, KARLA LIZBETH ARIAS
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO KARLA BARAJAS ON 5/10/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NO SUCH NUMBER-UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST.
